name: WEBTOON Entertainment Inc.
business: WEBTOON operates a global storytelling platform connecting creators with users, generating revenue through Paid Content (sales of serialized episodes), Advertising (display and achievement-based ads), and IP Adaptations (licensing content for film, series, games, and merchandise). It serves a community of amateur and professional creators who monetize their content, and users who consume content for free or via paid access.

exposures.sentence: Finally, our platform is underpinned by our foundational technology and artificial intelligence, enabling content creation and discovery and recommendation.

catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete our infrastructure investments by the end of the first quarter of 2026, and redeploy engineering resources to support improvements across our personalized recommendation tools.
